trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s 2025 tests recommend ARBOREA and CARREFOUR CLASSIC as top picks for latte, citing good quality and reasonable price. The evidence is fresh, with publications in April and June 2025.
